image_1608d4e07bf248.png.raw: {"class":"formula","latex":"\\sin C=\\sin(A+B)=\\sin A\\cos B+\\cos A\\sin B=\\frac{1}{3}\\times\\frac{7}{9}+\\frac{2\\sqrt{2}}{3}\\times\\frac{4\\sqrt{2}}{9}=\\frac{23}{27}","note":"正弦和角公式計算"}

image_161aa6426dce53.png.note: 正切差角公式代入計算
